questions.question: Explain the difference between a firewall and an intrusion detection system (IDS) in terms of their primary function. (6 marks)
A website is compromised by a hacker who has gained access to the server's root directory. What steps can be taken to contain the breach and prevent further damage? (8 marks)
What is the purpose of a secure socket layer (SSL) certificate, and why is it essential for encrypting online transactions? (5 marks)
